title: Returns & Refund Policy
intro: Your satisfaction is our priority. Please review our return and refund guidelines below.
policies: We do not issue cash refunds or exchanges
Defective products must be reported within 48 hours of delivery
Photo or video evidence is required for all claims
Approved claims are refunded as loyalty points (store credit)
Claims without supporting evidence may be denied
Contact support@yellowleaf.club for all return inquiries
